top3.sql:
SELECT category, amount
FROM budget
WHERE link_to_event = (
    SELECT event_id
    FROM event
    WHERE event_name = 'April Speaker'
)
ORDER BY amount ASC;

SELECT category, amount
FROM budget
JOIN event ON budget.link_to_event = event.event_id
WHERE event.event_name = 'April Speaker'
ORDER BY amount ASC;

    SELECT event_id
    FROM event
    WHERE event_name = 'April Speaker'
)
ORDER BY amount ASC;

SELECT category, amount
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE e.event_name = 'April Speaker'
ORDER BY b.amount ASC;
